name: UBA : Critical Systems Users Seen Update
notes: Updates the last seen value in the "Critical Systems Users Seen" reference collection for Destination IP/Username matches that already exist.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success, BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Critical Assets - IP
when any of Destination IP is the key and any of Username is the value in any of Critical Systems Users Seen - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Critical Systems Users Seen Update on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success, BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Critical Assets - IP
AND when any of Destination IP is the key and any of Username is the value in any of Critical Systems Users Seen - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Add "userName" to Reference Map Of Sets: "Critical Systems Users Seen" with key "destinationIP"
